rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: This class will give students the opportunity to read, write, listen and speak English relating to science and biology. Students will experience interactive lectures, discussions and presentations about topics in biology in an immersive English environment.
aims: Students will acquire intermediate knowledge of English for Biological Sciences while exploring topics in biology.
goals: Learn how to access knowledge written in English.
Explore topics in biology using English.
Create short English research reports about high interest topics relating to student studies.
Create English presentations using unique ideas.
Give English presentations to the class.
Using English, participate in communicative tasks relating to biology.

plan.text: Course Introduction, Self Introductions, Interests within the field of biology

textbooks: No textbook is required. All materials will be available on Moodle.
prereq: An intermediate command of communicative English.
prep: Students are required to spend a reasonable amount of time at home preparing for class, reading, writing, and preparing for presentations.

extra.label: 【テーマ（日本語）】(IN JAPANESE)
extra.text: 短いレポートやプレゼンテーションを含むクリティカル・シンキング・プロジェクトを通して、英語を使って生物学のトピックを探求します。

extra.label: 【テーマ（英語）】(IN ENGLISH)
extra.text: Students will explore topics in biology using English through critical thinking projects including short reports and presentations.
